ogTitle: Custon vs Cuttlefish Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Custon and Cuttlefish Bay.
heading: Custon vs Cuttlefish Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Custon, South Australia and Cuttlefish Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Custon has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Cuttlefish Bay (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Custon or Cuttlefish Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Custon has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Cuttlefish Bay scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Custon scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Cuttlefish Bay scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Custon or Cuttlefish Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Custon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
